title: Zebitrope (disambiguation)
content:
'''Zebitrope''' may refer to one of the following:

*The '''[[Zebitrope system/Legends|Zebitrope system]]''', a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories's]] [[Centrality/Legends|Centrality]]
**'''[[Zebitrope IV]]'''
**'''[[Zebitrope VIII]]'''
*The '''[[Zebitrope sector]]''', a [[Sector/Legends|sector]] of [[Realspace/Legends|space]]

{{Disambig}}
